scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter "!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox" --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
